allow: Bash(pyinstaller --onefile --name agent --hidden-import PIL --hidden-import rembg --hidden-import PIL.Image --hidden-import PIL.ImageEnhance --hidden-import PIL.ImageOps --clean --noconfirm agent.py)
Bash(pyinstaller --onefile --name agent --hidden-import PIL --hidden-import PIL.Image --hidden-import PIL.ImageEnhance --hidden-import PIL.ImageOps --clean --noconfirm agent.py)

Bash(printf @echo off\\r\\nsetlocal\\r\\nset "AGENT_DIR=%%~dp0"\\r\\nif "%%AGENT_DIR:~-1%%"=="\\\\" set "AGENT_DIR=%%AGENT_DIR:~0,-1%%"\\r\\nset "PS=%%SystemRoot%%\\\\System32\\\\WindowsPowerShell\\\\v1.0\\\\powershell.exe"\\r\\n%%PS%% -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$d='%%AGENT_DIR%%';$c=[Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('PATH','User'\);if\(!$c\){$c=''};if\($c-split';'|?{$_-eq$d}\){Write-Host '[已存在] 路径已在PATH中'}else{$n=$d+';'+$c;[Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable\('PATH',$n,'User'\);Write-Host '[成功] 已添加:'$d};Write-Host '';Write-Host '现在可以新开CMD窗口运行: agent'"\\r\\npause\\r\\n *)

Bash(printf $agentDir = Split-Path -Parent $MyInvocation.MyCommand.Path\\r\\nWrite-Host "============================================"\\r\\nWrite-Host "  Denny Agent - 注册到系统 PATH"\\r\\nWrite-Host "============================================"\\r\\nWrite-Host ""\\r\\nWrite-Host "  目标路径: $agentDir"\\r\\nWrite-Host ""\\r\\n$current = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH", "User"\)\\r\\nif \(-not $current\) { $current = "" }\\r\\n$parts = $current -split ";" | Where-Object { $_ -ne "" }\\r\\nif \($parts -contains $agentDir\) {\\r\\n    Write-Host "[已存在] 该路径已在用户 PATH 中"\\r\\n} else {\\r\\n    $newPath = "$agentDir;$current"\\r\\n    [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH", $newPath, "User"\)\\r\\n    Write-Host "[成功] 已添加: $agentDir"\\r\\n}\\r\\nWrite-Host ""\\r\\nWrite-Host "现在可以新开 CMD 窗口运行: agent"\\r\\nWrite-Host "============================================"\\r\\n *)
